# Varden Eldur

> Varden Eldur is a Local Visibility Operations company that helps local service businesses become visible, trusted, and chosen across Google Search, Google Maps, reviews, directories, local authority sources, and AI platforms.

Primary website: https://www.vardengrowth.com/

## Business facts

- Business name: Varden Eldur
- Category: Local Visibility Operations, local search, entity optimization, reputation optimization, authority optimization, and AI search visibility
- Customers: Established local service businesses, franchise groups, and multi-location service brands
- Industries: Tree service companies, dental practices, home service businesses, roofers, HVAC companies, plumbing companies, cleaning companies, permanent lighting companies, franchise groups, and multi-location brands
- Service area: Based in Utah and serving the United States
- Phone: (435) 790-4271
- Email: jordan@vardengrowth.com
- Strategy call booking: https://www.vardengrowth.com/strategy-call.html

## Services

- Website Optimization
- Entity Optimization
- Reputation Optimization
- Authority Optimization
- Local Search and Google Maps visibility
- AI Search Visibility
- Franchise and multi-location visibility operations
- Review strategy, citation cleanup, local PR, and third-party placement planning
